# Langfuse

> Langfuse is an **open-source AI engineering platform** ([GitHub](https://github.com/langfuse/langfuse)) that helps teams collaboratively debug, analyze, and iterate on their LLM applications. All platform features are natively integrated to accelerate the development workflow.

## Langfuse Docs MCP Server

Connect to the Langfuse Docs MCP server to access documentation directly in your AI editor:

- **Endpoint**: `https://langfuse.com/api/mcp`
- **Transport**: `streamableHttp`
- **Documentation**: [Langfuse Docs MCP Server](https://langfuse.com/docs/docs-mcp)

The MCP server provides tools to search Langfuse documentation, GitHub issues, and discussions. See the [installation guide](https://langfuse.com/docs/docs-mcp) for setup instructions in Cursor, VS Code, Claude Desktop, and other MCP clients.

## Langfuse Skill for AI Coding Agents

Install the Langfuse skill before implementing anything with Langfuse. The skill provides up-to-date documentation, best-practice workflows for instrumentation, prompt management, and programmatic API access via the Langfuse CLI.

Install from: [github.com/langfuse/skills](https://github.com/langfuse/skills/tree/main/skills/langfuse)

## Docs

For the best results, install the [Langfuse skill](https://github.com/langfuse/skills/tree/main/skills/langfuse) before using these docs.

For the full list with links to each page, see: https://langfuse.com/llms-docs.txt

Pages: Docs, Audit Logs, Authentication And Sso, Billable Units, Data Deletion, Data Retention, Llm Connection, Rbac, Scim And Org Api, Spend Alerts, Troubleshooting And Faq, Agent Skill, Blob Storage Export Fields, Cli, Export From Ui, Export To Blob Storage, Mcp Server, Observations Api, Public Api, Query Via Sdk, Overview, Ask Ai, Demo, Docs Mcp, Core Concepts, Annotation Queues, Code Evaluators, Llm As A Judge, Scores Via Sdk, Scores Via Ui, Data Model, Datasets, Experiments Ci Cd, Experiments Via Sdk, Experiments Via Ui, Overview, Data Model, Overview, Score Analytics, Troubleshooting And Faq, Glossary, Custom Dashboards, Metrics Api, Overview, Data Model, Agent Graphs, Comments, Corrections, Environments, Full Text Search, Log Levels, Masking, Mcp Tracing, Metadata, Multi Modality, Observation Types, Queuing Batching, Releases And Versioning, Sampling, Sessions, Tags, Token And Cost Tracking, Trace Ids And Distributed Tracing, Url, User Feedback, Users, Web Callouts, Get Started, Overview, Advanced Features, Instrumentation, Overview, Troubleshooting And Faq, Upgrade Path, Js V3 To V4, Js V4 To V5, Python V2 To V3, Python V3 To V4, Troubleshooting And Faq, Data Model, A B Testing, Caching, Composability, Config, Folders, Github Integration, Guaranteed Availability, Link To Traces, Mcp Server, Message Placeholders, N8n Node, Playground, Prompt Version Control, Variables, Webhooks Slack Integrations, Get Started, Overview, Troubleshooting And Faq, Roadmap, Security And Guardrails, V4

## Integrations

For the best results, install the [Langfuse skill](https://github.com/langfuse/skills/tree/main/skills/langfuse) before implementing any integration.

For the full list with links to each page, see: https://langfuse.com/llms-integrations.txt

Pages: Integrations, Agentic Data Stack, Coval, Mixpanel, Posthog, Trubrics, Augment Code, Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Kiro, Kiro Cli, Vscode, Agno Agents, Ai Sdk Cpp, Amazon Agentcore, Autogen, Beeai, Claude Agent Sdk, Claude Agent Sdk Js, Crewai, Dspy, Embabel, Google Adk, Haystack, Instructor, Koog, Langchain, Langchain Deepagents, Langserve, Litellm Sdk, Livekit, Llamaindex, Llamaindex Workflows, Mastra, Microsoft Agent Framework, Mirascope, Openai Agents, Pipecat, Pydantic Ai, Quarkus Langchain4j, Ragas, Restate, Semantic Kernel, Smolagents, Spring Ai, Strands Agents, Swiftide, Tanstack Ai, Temporal, Vercel Ai Sdk, Voltagent, Watsonx Orchestrate, Anannas, Helicone, Kong Ai Plugin, Litellm, Openrouter, Portkey, Truefoundry, Vercel Ai Gateway, Amazon Bedrock, Amazon Bedrock Agents, Anthropic, Anthropic Js, Baseten, Byteplus, Cerebras, Cleanlab, Cohere, Cometapi, Databricks, Deepseek, Fireworks Ai, Google Gemini, Google Vertex Ai, Groq, Huggingface, Mistral Sdk, Novitaai, Ollama, Openai Assistants Api, Openai Js, Openai Py, Qwen, Togetherai, Vllm, Xai Grok, Opentelemetry, Dify, Flowise, Goose, Langdock, Langflow, Lobechat, N8n, Openwebui, Ragflow, Vapi, Cognee, Exa, Firecrawl, Gradio, Hermes, Inferable, Librechat, Mcp Use, Milvus, Openclaw, Parallel Ai, Promptfoo, Testable Minds, Weco, Zapier
